sqlMap.select: SELECT TBL_CONTAINER.containerid, TBL_CONTAINER.containertypeid, TBL_CONTAINER.containerowndepid, TBL_CONTAINERTYPE.containertypename, TBL_CONTAINERTYPE.containertypename2 FROM TBL_CONTAINER JOIN TBL_CONTAINERTYPE ON TBL_CONTAINER.containertypeid = TBL_CONTAINERTYPE.containertypeid AND TBL_CONTAINER.tenant_id = TBL_CONTAINERTYPE.tenant_id AND TBL_CONTAINER.companyid = TBL_CONTAINERTYPE.companyid WHERE TBL_CONTAINER.tenant_id = #tenantID# AND TBL_CONTAINER.companyid = #companyID# AND containerowndepid = #v_DEPTID#

SELECT TBL_CONTAINERTODOCSTATE.containertypeid, TBL_CODELIST.code2 DocumentState, TBL_CONTAINERTYPE.containertypename, TBL_CONTAINERTYPE.containertypename2, TBL_CODELIST.name DOCUMENTSTATENAME, TBL_CODELIST.name2 DOCUMENTSTATENAME2, TBL_CODELIST.name3 DOCUMENTSTATENAME3, TBL_CODELIST.name4 DOCUMENTSTATENAME4 FROM TBL_CODELIST LEFT JOIN TBL_CONTAINERTODOCSTATE ON TBL_CONTAINERTODOCSTATE.tenant_id = TBL_CODELIST.tenant_id AND TBL_CONTAINERTODOCSTATE.companyid = TBL_CODELIST.companyid AND TBL_CONTAINERTODOCSTATE.documentstate = TBL_CODELIST.code2 LEFT JOIN TBL_CONTAINERTYPE ON TBL_CONTAINERTODOCSTATE.tenant_id = TBL_CONTAINERTYPE.tenant_id AND TBL_CONTAINERTODOCSTATE.companyid = TBL_CONTAINERTYPE.companyid AND TBL_CONTAINERTODOCSTATE.containertypeid = TBL_CONTAINERTYPE.containertypeid WHERE TBL_CODELIST.tenant_id = #tenantID# AND TBL_CODELIST.tenant_id = #companyID# AND TBL_CODELIST.code1 = 'A02' AND TBL_CODELIST.isuse = '1' ORDER BY TBL_CONTAINERTODOCSTATE.documentstate

SELECT containerid, usedepid, (SELECT displayname FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER AS T1 WHERE T1.tenant_id = #tenantID# AND cn = A.usedepid) as containerTypeName, (SELECT displayname2 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER AS T2 WHERE T2.tenant_id = #tenantID# AND cn = A.usedepid) as containerTypeName2 FROM TBL_CONTAINERUSEDEP A WHERE A.tenant_id = #tenantID# AND A.companyid = #companyID# AND containerid = #v_CONTID#

SELECT taskcode, keepingperiod, tempflag, displayrecflag, specialcatalogflag, sc1, sc2, sc3, keepingmethod, keepingplace, taskname, taskname2, subcategorycode FROM TBL_TASKCODE WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND subcategorycode = #v_SUBCATECODE# AND delflag = '0' ORDER BY taskcode

SELECT TBL_TASKCODE.taskcode, TBL_TASKCODE.taskname, NVL(TBL_TASKCODE.taskname2, TBL_TASKCODE.TASKNAME) AS TASKNAME2, TBL_TASKCODE.keepingperiod, TBL_TASKCODE.creationdate CREATEDATE, TBL_TASKCODE.kpreason, TBL_TASKCODE.keepingmethod, TBL_TASKCODE.keepingplace, TBL_TASKCODE.displayrecflag, TBL_TASKCODE.displayrectrastime, TBL_TASKCODE.exdisplayfrequency, TBL_TASKCODE.specialcatalogflag, TBL_TASKCODE.sc1, TBL_TASKCODE.sc2, TBL_TASKCODE.sc3, TBL_TASKCODE.displayusage, TBL_TASKCODE.description, TBL_TASKCODE.tempflag, TBL_TASK_DEPTINFO.processdate, TBL_TASK_DEPTINFO.applydate FROM TBL_TASKCODE LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_TASK_DEPTINFO ON TBL_TASKCODE.tenant_id = TBL_TASK_DEPTINFO.tenant_id AND TBL_TASKCODE.companyid = TBL_TASK_DEPTINFO.companyid AND TBL_TASKCODE.taskcode = TBL_TASK_DEPTINFO.taskcode WHERE TBL_TASKCODE.tenant_id = #tenantID# AND TBL_TASKCODE.companyid = #companyID# AND TBL_TASKCODE.taskcode = #v_TASKCODE#
AND TRIM(TBL_TASK_DEPTINFO.processdeptcode) = #v_DEPTCODE#

SELECT taskcode, taskname, taskname2, keepingperiod, kpreason, keepingmethod, keepingplace, displayrecflag, displayrectrastime, exdisplayfrequency, specialcatalogflag, sc1, sc2, sc3, displayusage, description, subcategorycode FROM TBL_TASKCODE WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND taskcode = #v_TASKCODE#
SELECT taskname, taskname2 FROM TBL_TASKCODE WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND taskcode = #v_TASKCODE#

SELECT processdeptcode, processdeptname, NVL(processdeptname2, PROCESSDEPTNAME) AS PROCESSDEPTNAME2, categorycode, cname, NVL(cname2,CNAME) AS CNAME2, mcategorycode, mcname, NVL(mcname2, MCNAME) AS MCNAME2, subcategorycode, scname, NVL(scname2, SCNAME) AS SCNAME2, taskcode, taskname, NVL(taskname2, TASKNAME) AS TASKNAME2, keepingperiod, keepingmethod, keepingplace, displayrecflag, displayrectrastime, specialcatalogflag, sc1, sc2, sc3, tempflag FROM VTASKCLASS WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID#
AND ( TRIM(processdeptcode) = #v_DEPTCODE# OR taskcode LIKE 'ZZ%' OR taskcode = '99999999')
ORDER BY taskcode ASC

SELECT processdeptcode, processdeptname, processdeptname2 FROM TBL_TASK_DEPTINFO WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND taskcode = #v_TASKCODE# AND delflag = '0' ORDER BY processdeptcode

isEqual.isEqual: SELECT sealnum, sealname, sealpath, sealwidth, sealheight, TO_CHAR(regdate, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') REGDATE, TO_CHAR(deldate, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') DELDATE, reguserid, regusername FROM TBL_SEALINFO WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# ORDER BY regdate DESC
isEqual.isNotEqual: SELECT sealnum, sealname, sealpath, sealwidth, sealheight, TO_CHAR(regdate, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') REGDATE, TO_CHAR(deldate, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') DELDATE, reguserid, regusername FROM TBL_SEALINFO WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND deldate IS NULL ORDER BY regdate DESC

isNotEqual.isEqual: SELECT sealnum, sealname, sealpath, sealwidth, sealheight, TO_CHAR(regdate, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') REGDATE, TO_CHAR(deldate, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') DELDATE, reguserid, NVL(regusername2, REGUSERNAME) REGUSERNAME FROM TBL_SEALINFO WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# ORDER BY regdate DESC
isNotEqual.isNotEqual: SELECT sealnum, sealname, sealpath, sealwidth, sealheight, TO_CHAR(regdate, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') REGDATE, TO_CHAR(deldate, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') DELDATE, reguserid, NVL(regusername2, REGUSERNAME) REGUSERNAME FROM TBL_SEALINFO WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND deldate IS NULL ORDER BY regdate DESC

select.isEqual: SELECT sealnum, sealname, sealpath, sealwidth, sealheight, TO_CHAR(regdate, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') REGDATE, TO_CHAR(deldate, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') DELDATE, reguserid, regusername, regusername2 FROM TBL_SEALDEPTINFO WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND deptid = #v_DEPTID# ORDER BY regdate DESC
select.isNotEqual: SELECT sealnum, sealname, sealpath, sealwidth, sealheight, TO_CHAR(regdate, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') REGDATE, TO_CHAR(deldate, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') DELDATE, reguserid, regusername, regusername2 FROM TBL_SEALDEPTINFO WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND deldate IS NULL AND deptid = #v_DEPTID# ORDER BY REGDATE DESC

sqlMap.select:
SELECT * FROM (SELECT A.* FROM (SELECT * FROM (SELECT rownum as rnum, aa.* FROM (SELECT TBL_APRDOCINFO.docid, formid, orgdocid, doctype, docstate, functiontype, href, doctitle, docno, hasattachyn, hasopinionyn, TO_CHAR(startdate, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS STARTDATE, TO_CHAR(enddate, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS ENDDATE, writerid, writername, NVL(writername2, WRITERNAME) AS WRITERNAME2, writerjobtitle, NVL(writerjobtitle2, WRITERJOBTITLE) AS WRITERJOBTITLE2, writerdeptid, writerdeptname, NVL(writerdeptname2,WRITERDEPTNAME) AS WRITERDEPTNAME2, ispublic, securitycode, storageperiod, keyword, formname, NVL(formname2,FORMNAME) AS FORMNAME2, itemcode, itemname, NVL(itemname2, ITEMNAME) AS ITEMNAME2, urgentapproval, tempattribute, status, specialrecordcode, publicitycode, limitrange, pagenum, cabinetid, taskcode, docnumcode, orgdocnumcode, seperateattachxml, summary, TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO RIGHT OUTER JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT docid, tenant_id, companyid FROM TBL_APRLINEINFO WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID#
AND TBL_APRLINEINFO.aprmembername = #v_APPROVUSER#
) aaa ON TBL_APRDOCINFO.tenant_id = aaa.tenant_id AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.companyid = aaa.companyid AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.docid = aaa.docid INNER JOIN TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO ON TBL_APRDOCINFO.tenant_id = TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.tenant_id AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.companyid = TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.companyid AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.docid = TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.docid WHERE (functiontype IS NOT NULL) AND (startdate IS NOT NULL)
AND docno LIKE '%' || #v_DOCNUMBER# || '%'
AND doctitle LIKE '%' || #v_DOCTITLE# || '%'
AND writername$v_LANGTYPE$ LIKE '%' || #v_DRAFTER# || '%'
AND writerdeptname$v_LANGTYPE$ LIKE '%' || #v_DEPTNAME# || '%'
AND formid = #v_FORMID#
AND docstate = #v_DOCSTATE#
AND TO_CHAR(startdate, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') >= #v_STARTDATE1#
AND TO_CHAR(startdate, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') <= #v_STARTDATE2#
AND TO_CHAR(enddate, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') >= #v_ENDDATE1#
AND TO_CHAR(enddate, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') <= #v_ENDDATE2#
AND #v_SUBQUERY#
ORDER BY #v_ORDEROPTION#
ORDER BY #v_ORDEROPTION#, startdate DESC
ORDER BY startdate DESC
) aa ) WHERE rnum <= #v_PAGESIZE#) A
ORDER BY #v_ORDEROPTION2#
ORDER BY #v_ORDEROPTION2#, startdate
ORDER BY startdate
) WHERE rownum <= #v_PAGESIZE2# ORDER BY startdate DESC
SELECT * FROM TBL_FORMCONTUSERGROUP WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND formcontid = #v_FORMCONTID#

SELECT formcontid, formid, formname, formname2, formdoctype, formdescription, formfilelocation, formconnflag FROM TBL_FORMINFO WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND formid = #v_PFORMID#
SELECT deptid FROM TBL_FORMRECV WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND formid = #v_FORMID# ORDER BY deptsn

select.isEqual: SELECT categorycode, name, NVL(name2, NAME) NAME2, description, '1' CATEGORYTYPE, 'ROOT' FROM TBL_TASKCATEGORY WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND oldflag IS NULL

SELECT mcategorycode, name, NVL(name2, NAME) NAME2, description, '2' CATEGORYTYPE, categorycode FROM TBL_TASKMIDDLECATEGORY WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND categorycode = #v_PARENTID# AND oldflag IS NULL

SELECT subcategorycode, name, NVL(name2, NAME) NAME2, description, '3' CATEGORYTYPE, mcategorycode FROM TBL_TASKSUBCATEGORY WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND mcategorycode = #v_PARENTID# AND oldflag IS NULL
SELECT * FROM TBL_ADMINRECEIPTGROUP_SUB WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND mainid = #v_MAINID# ORDER BY subid

SELECT DISTINCT TBL_ADMINRECEIPTGROUP_MAIN.mainid, TBL_ADMINRECEIPTGROUP_MAIN.mainname FROM TBL_ADMINRECEIPTGROUP_MAIN JOIN TBL_ADMINRECEIPTGROUP_SUB ON TBL_ADMINRECEIPTGROUP_MAIN.tenant_id = TBL_ADMINRECEIPTGROUP_SUB.tenant_id AND TBL_ADMINRECEIPTGROUP_MAIN.companyid = TBL_ADMINRECEIPTGROUP_SUB.companyid AND TBL_ADMINRECEIPTGROUP_MAIN.mainid = TBL_ADMINRECEIPTGROUP_SUB.mainid WHERE TBL_ADMINRECEIPTGROUP_MAIN.tenant_id = #tenantID# AND TBL_ADMINRECEIPTGROUP_MAIN.companyid = #companyID# ORDER BY TBL_ADMINRECEIPTGROUP_MAIN.mainid

isNotEqual.isNotEqual: SELECT * FROM TBL_ADMINRECEIPTGROUP_MAIN WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# ORDER BY mainid

isEqual.isNotEqual: SELECT applydate, taskcode, taskname, changefactor, beforevalue, aftervalue FROM TBL_TASKCODEHISTORY WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND taskcode = #v_TASKCODE# ORDER BY sn DESC
isEqual.isEqual: SELECT * FROM (SELECT applydate, taskcode, taskname, taskname2, changefactor, beforevalue, aftervalue FROM TBL_TASKCODEHISTORY WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# ORDER BY sn DESC) WHERE ROWNUM <= 100

isNotEqual.isNotEqual: SELECT applydate, taskcode, NVL(taskname2, TASKNAME) TASKNAME, NVL(changefactor2, CHANGEFACTOR) CHANGEFACTOR, beforevalue, aftervalue2 AFTERVALUE FROM TBL_TASKCODEHISTORY WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND taskcode = #v_TASKCODE# ORDER BY sn DESC
isNotEqual.isEqual: SELECT * FROM (SELECT applydate, taskcode, NVL(taskname2, TASKNAME) TASKNAME, NVL(changefactor2, CHANGEFACTOR) CHANGEFACTOR, beforevalue, aftervalue2 AFTERVALUE FROM TBL_TASKCODEHISTORY WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# ORDER BY sn DESC) WHERE ROWNUM <= 100

isEqual.isEqual: SELECT sentdeptid, sentdeptname, NVL(COUNT(sentdeptid), 0) APRCOUNT FROM TBL_ENDRECEIPTPROCESSINFO WHERE docstate = '011' AND processdate >= TO_DATE(#v_FROM#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND processdate < TO_DATE(#v_TO#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# GROUP BY sentdeptid, sentdeptname ORDER BY sentdeptname

SELECT receiveddeptid , receiveddeptname , NVL(COUNT(receiveddeptid), 0) APRCOUNT FROM TBL_ENDRECEIPTPROCESSINFO WHERE docstate = '011' AND processdate >= TO_DATE(#v_FROM#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND processdate < TO_DATE(#v_TO#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# GROUP BY receiveddeptid, receiveddeptname ORDER BY receiveddeptname

isNotEqual.isNotEqual: SELECT sentdeptid , sentdeptname, receiveddeptid, receiveddeptname, NVL(COUNT(sentdeptid), 0) APRCOUNT FROM TBL_ENDRECEIPTPROCESSINFO WHERE docstate = '011' AND processdate >= TO_DATE(#v_FROM#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND processdate < TO_DATE(#v_TO#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# GROUP BY sentdeptid, sentdeptname, receiveddeptid, receiveddeptname ORDER BY sentdeptname, receiveddeptname

isNotEqual.isEqual: SELECT sentdeptid, sentdeptname2 SENTDEPTNAME, NVL(COUNT(sentdeptid), 0) APRCOUNT FROM TBL_ENDRECEIPTPROCESSINFO WHERE docstate = '011' AND receivesn = '2' AND processdate >= TO_DATE(#v_FROM#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND processdate < TO_DATE(#v_TO#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# GROUP BY sentdeptid, sentdeptname2 ORDER BY sentdeptname2

SELECT receiveddeptid, receiveddeptname2 RECEIVEDDEPTNAME, COUNT(receiveddeptid) APRCOUNT FROM TBL_ENDRECEIPTPROCESSINFO WHERE docstate = '011' AND processdate >= TO_DATE(#v_FROM#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND processdate < TO_DATE(#v_TO#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# GROUP BY receiveddeptid, receiveddeptname2 ORDER BY receiveddeptname2

isNotEqual.isNotEqual: SELECT sentdeptid, sentdeptname2 SENTDEPTNAME, receiveddeptid, receiveddeptname2 RECEIVEDDEPTNAME, NVL(COUNT(sentdeptid), 0) APRCOUNT FROM TBL_ENDRECEIPTPROCESSINFO WHERE docstate = '011' AND processdate >= TO_DATE(#v_FROM#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND processdate < TO_DATE(#v_TO#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# GROUP BY sentdeptid, sentdeptname2, receiveddeptid, receiveddeptname2 ORDER BY sentdeptname2, receiveddeptname2

sqlMap.select: SELECT aprmemberdeptid, aprmemberid, aprmembername$v_STRLANG$, aprmemberdeptname$v_STRLANG$, aprmemberjobtitle$v_STRLANG$, NVL(COUNT(aprmemberid), 0) AS APRCOUNT FROM TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO WHERE aprtype = #v_APRTYPE# AND processdate >= TO_DATE(#v_FROM#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND processdate < TO_DATE(#v_TO#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# GROUP BY aprmemberdeptid, aprmemberid, aprmembername$v_STRLANG$, aprmemberdeptname$v_STRLANG$, aprmemberjobtitle$v_STRLANG$ ORDER BY aprmemberdeptname$v_STRLANG$, aprmembername$v_STRLANG$

SELECT NVL(COUNT(TBL_CONTAINER.containerid), 0) FROM TBL_CONTAINER JOIN TBL_CONTAINERTYPE ON TBL_CONTAINER.tenant_id = TBL_CONTAINERTYPE.tenant_id AND TBL_CONTAINER.companyid = TBL_CONTAINERTYPE.companyid AND TBL_CONTAINER.containertypeid = TBL_CONTAINERTYPE.containertypeid WHERE TBL_CONTAINER.tenant_id = #tenantID# AND TBL_CONTAINER.companyid = #companyID# AND TBL_CONTAINER.containertypeid = #v_CONTTYPEID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_CONTAINERTODOCSTATE WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND containertypeid = #v_CONTTYPEID#
DELETE FROM TBL_CONTAINERTYPE WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND containertypeid = #v_CONTTYPEID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT MAX(formid) FROM TBL_FORMINFO WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_FORMINFO (formcontid, formid, formname, formname2, formdoctype, formdescription, formfilelocation, formconnflag, companyid, tenant_id) VALUES (#v_PFORMCONTAINERID#, #v_PID#, #v_PFORMNAME#, #v_PFORMNAME2#, #v_PFORMKIND#, #v_PFORMDESCRIPT#, #v_PURL#, #v_PFORMCONNFLAG#, #companyID#, #tenantID#)
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_FORMINFO SET formcontid = #v_PFORMCONTAINERID#, formname = #v_PFORMNAME#, formname2 = #v_PFORMNAME2#, formdoctype = #v_PFORMKIND#, formdescription = #v_PFORMDESCRIPT#, formfilelocation = #v_PURL#, formconnflag = #v_PFORMCONNFLAG# WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND formid = #v_PFORMID# AND companyid = #companyID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_FORMRECV WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND formid = #v_PFORMID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_FORMRECV (formid, deptid, deptsn, companyid, tenant_id) VALUES (#v_PFORMID#, #deptID#, #deptSN#, #companyID#, #tenantID#)
sqlMap.select: SELECT containerid FROM TBL_CONTAINER WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND containertypeid = #v_CONTTYPEID# AND containerowndepid = (SELECT containerowndepid FROM TBL_CONTAINER WHERE containerID = #v_DEPTID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#)

select.isEqual: SELECT NVL(COUNT(categorycode), 0) FROM TBL_TASKCATEGORY WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND categorycode = #v_CATECODE#
SELECT NVL(COUNT(mcategorycode), 0) FROM TBL_TASKMIDDLECATEGORY WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND mcategorycode = #v_CATECODE#
SELECT NVL(COUNT(subcategorycode), 0) FROM TBL_TASKSUBCATEGORY WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND subcategorycode = #v_CATECODE#
SELECT NVL(COUNT(mcategorycode), 0) FROM TBL_TASKMIDDLECATEGORY WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND categorycode = #v_CATECODE# AND oldflag IS NULL
SELECT NVL(COUNT(subcategorycode), 0) FROM TBL_TASKSUBCATEGORY WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND mcategorycode = #v_CATECODE# AND oldflag IS NULL
SELECT NVL(COUNT(taskcode), 0) FROM TBL_TASKCODE WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND subcategorycode = #v_CATECODE# AND delflag = '0'

sqlMap.select: SELECT NVL(COUNT(taskcode), 0) FROM TBL_TASKCODE WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND taskcode = #v_TASKCODE#

select.isEqual: SELECT NVL(COUNT(taskcode), 0) FROM TBL_CABINETCLASS WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND taskcode = #v_TASKCODE#
select.isNotEqual: SELECT NVL(COUNT(taskcode), 0) FROM TBL_CABINETCLASS WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND taskcode = #v_TASKCODE# AND TRIM(processdeptcode) = #v_DEPTID#

sqlMap.select: SELECT NVL(COUNT(taskcode), 0) FROM TBL_TASK_DEPTINFO WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND taskcode = #v_TASKCODE# AND RTRIM(processdeptcode) = #v_DEPTCODE#

SELECT NVL(COUNT(DISTINCT TBL_APRDOCINFO.docid), 0) FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO RIGHT OUTER JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT docid, companyid, tenant_id FROM TBL_APRLINEINFO WHERE TBL_APRLINEINFO.tenant_id = #tenantID# AND TBL_APRLINEINFO.companyid = #companyID#
AND TBL_APRLINEINFO.aprmembername = #v_APPROVUSER#
) aaa ON TBL_APRDOCINFO.tenant_id = aaa.tenant_id AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.companyid = aaa.companyid AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.docid = aaa.docid INNER JOIN TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO ON TBL_APRDOCINFO.tenant_id = TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.tenant_id AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.companyid = TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.companyid AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.docid = TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.docid WHERE TBL_APRDOCINFO.tenant_id = #tenantID# AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.companyid = #companyID# AND (functiontype IS NOT NULL) AND (startdate IS NOT NULL)
AND docno LIKE '%' || #v_DOCNUMBER# || '%'
AND doctitle LIKE '%' || #v_DOCTITLE# || '%'
AND writername$v_LANGTYPE$ LIKE '%' || #v_DRAFTER# || '%'
AND writerdeptname$v_LANGTYPE$ LIKE '%' || #v_DEPTNAME# || '%'
AND formid = #v_FORMID#
AND docstate = #v_DOCSTATE#
AND TO_CHAR(startdate, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') >= #v_STARTDATE1#
AND TO_CHAR(startdate, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') <= #v_STARTDATE2#
AND TO_CHAR(enddate, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') >= #v_ENDDATE1#
AND TO_CHAR(enddate, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') <= #v_ENDDATE2#
AND #v_SUBQUERY#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_CONTAINERTYPE (containertypeid, containertypename, containertypename2, companyid, tenant_id) VALUES ((SELECT NVL(MAX(CAST(TRIM(containertypeid) as NUMBER)), 1000) + 10 FROM TBL_CONTAINERTYPE WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID#), #v_CONTTYPENAME#, #v_CONTTYPENAME2#, #companyID#, #tenantID#)
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_CONTAINERUSEDEP WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND containerid = #v_CONTID#
DELETE FROM TBL_CONTAINER WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND containerid = #v_CONTID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_ADMINRECEIPTGROUP_SUB (mainid, subid, deptid, deptname, deptname2, companyid, tenant_id) VALUES (#v_MAINID#, (SELECT NVL(MAX(subid), 0) + 1 FROM TBL_ADMINRECEIPTGROUP_SUB), #v_DEPTID#, #v_DEPTNAME#, #v_DEPTNAME2#, #v_COMPANYID#, #tenantID#)
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_ADMINRECEIPTGROUP_SUB WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND subid = #v_SUBID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_ADMINRECEIPTGROUP_MAIN SET mainname = #v_MAINNAME# WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND mainid = #v_MAINID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_ADMINRECEIPTGROUP_MAIN (mainid, mainname, companyid, tenant_id) VALUES ((SELECT NVL(MAX(mainid),0) + 1 FROM TBL_ADMINRECEIPTGROUP_MAIN WHERE tenant_ID = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID#), #v_MAINNAME#, #companyID#, #tenantID#)
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_ADMINRECEIPTGROUP_MAIN WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND mainid = #v_MAINID#

insert.isEqual: INSERT INTO TBL_TASKCATEGORY (categorycode, name, name2, description, oldflag, companyid, tenant_id) VALUES (#v_CATECODE#, #v_NAME#, #v_NAME2#, #v_DESC#, NULL, #companyID#, #tenantID#)

INSERT INTO TBL_TASKMIDDLECATEGORY (mcategorycode, name, name2, description, categorycode, oldflag, companyid, tenant_id) VALUES (#v_CATECODE#, #v_NAME#, #v_NAME2#, #v_DESC#, #v_CODE#, NULL, #companyID#, #tenantID#)

INSERT INTO TBL_TASKSUBCATEGORY (subcategorycode, name, name2, description, mcategorycode, oldflag, companyid, tenant_id) VALUES (#v_CATECODE#, #v_NAME#, #v_NAME2#, #v_DESC#, #v_CODE#, NULL, #companyID#, #tenantID#)

update.isEqual: UPDATE TBL_TASKCATEGORY SET name = #v_NAME#, name2 = #v_NAME2#, description = #v_DESC# WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND categorycode = #v_CATECODE#

UPDATE TBL_TASKMIDDLECATEGORY SET name = #v_NAME#, name2 = #v_NAME2#, description = #v_DESC#, categorycode = #v_CODE# WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND mcategorycode = #v_CATECODE#

UPDATE TBL_TASKSUBCATEGORY SET name = #v_NAME#, name2 = #v_NAME2#, description = #v_DESC#, mcategorycode = #v_CODE# WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid= #companyID# AND subcategorycode = #v_CATECODE#
UPDATE TBL_TASKCATEGORY SET oldflag = 'Y' WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND categorycode = #v_CATECODE#
UPDATE TBL_TASKMIDDLECATEGORY SET oldflag = 'Y' WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND mcategorycode = #v_CATECODE#
UPDATE TBL_TASKSUBCATEGORY SET oldflag = 'Y' WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND subcategorycode = #v_CATECODE#
UPDATE TBL_SEALINFO SET deldate = TO_DATE(#v_pNow#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND deldate IS NULL
update.isNotEqual: UPDATE TBL_SEALINFO SET deldate = TO_DATE(#v_pNow#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND sealnum = #v_SEALNUM#

update.isEqual: UPDATE TBL_SEALDEPTINFO SET deldate = TO_DATE(#v_pNow#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND deldate IS NULL AND deptid = #v_DEPTID#
update.isNotEqual: UPDATE TBL_SEALDEPTINFO SET deldate = TO_DATE(#v_pNow#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND sealnum = #v_SEALNUM# AND deptid = #v_DEPTID#

sqlMap.select: SELECT NVL(COUNT(sealnum), 0) FROM TBL_SEALINFO WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND sealnum = #v_SEALNUM#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_SEALINFO (sealnum, sealname, sealpath, sealwidth, sealheight, regdate, deldate, reguserid, regusername, regusername2, companyid, tenant_id) VALUES ((SELECT NVL(MAX(sealnum), 0) + 1 FROM TBL_SEALINFO), #v_SEALNAME#, #v_SEALPATH#, #v_SEALWIDTH#, #v_SEALHEIGHT#, TO_DATE(#v_pNow#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), NULL, #v_REGUSERID#, #v_REGUSERNAME#, #v_REGUSERNAME2#, #companyID#, #tenantID#)
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_SEALINFO SET sealname = #v_SEALNAME#, sealpath = #v_SEALPATH#, sealwidth = #v_SEALWIDTH#, sealheight = #v_SEALHEIGHT#, reguserid = #v_REGUSERID#, regusername = #v_REGUSERNAME#, regusername2 = #v_REGUSERNAME2# WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND sealnum = #v_SEALNUM#
sqlMap.select: SELECT NVL(COUNT(sealnum), 0) FROM TBL_SEALDEPTINFO WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND sealnum = #v_SEALNUM# AND deptid = #v_DEPTID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_SEALDEPTINFO (sealnum, deptid, sealname, sealpath, sealwidth, sealheight, regdate, deldate, reguserid, regusername, regusername2, companyid, tenant_id) VALUES ((SELECT NVL(MAX(sealnum) , 0) + 1 FROM TBL_SEALDEPTINFO WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND deptid = #v_DEPTID#), #v_DEPTID#, #v_SEALNAME#, #v_SEALPATH#, #v_SEALWIDTH#, #v_SEALHEIGHT#, TO_DATE(#v_pNow#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), NULL, #v_REGUSERID#, #v_REGUSERNAME#, #v_REGUSERNAME2#, #companyID#, #tenantID#)
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_SEALDEPTINFO SET sealname = #v_SEALNAME#, sealpath = #v_SEALPATH#, sealwidth = #v_SEALWIDTH#, sealheight = #v_SEALHEIGHT#, reguserid = #v_REGUSERID#, regusername = #v_REGUSERNAME#, regusername2 = #v_REGUSERNAME2# WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND sealnum = #v_SEALNUM# AND deptid = #v_DEPTID#
UPDATE TBL_FORMINFO SET formorder = #order# WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND formid = #v_pFormID# AND formcontid = #v_pFormContID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_FORMCONTUSERGROUP WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND formcontid = #v_FORMCONTID#
DELETE FROM TBL_FORMCONTAINER WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND formcontid = #v_FORMCONTID#
DELETE FROM TBL_FORMINFO WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND formid = #v_FORMID#
DELETE FROM TBL_FORMUSERINFO WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND formid = #v_FORMID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO SET containerid = #v_CONTID# WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND docid = #v_DOCID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT MAX(formcontid) FROM TBL_FORMCONTAINER WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID#
SELECT containertypeid, containertypename, containertypename2 FROM TBL_CONTAINERTYPE WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID#
SELECT NVL(MAX(containerid), '0000000000') as contid FROM TBL_CONTAINER WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_CONTAINERTODOCSTATE (containertypeid, documentstate, companyid, tenant_id) VALUES (#data1#, #data2#, #companyID#, #tenantID#)
INSERT INTO TBL_CONTAINER (containerid, containertypeid, containerowndepid, companyid, tenant_id) VALUES (#contID#, #contType#, #deptID#, #companyID#, #tenantID#)
INSERT INTO TBL_CONTAINERUSEDEP (containerid, usedepid, companyid, tenant_id) VALUES (#contID#, #deptID#, #companyID#, #tenantID#)

INSERT INTO TBL_TASKCODEHISTORY (sn, applydate, taskcode, taskname, taskname2, changefactor, changefactor2, beforevalue, aftervalue, aftervalue2, companyid, tenant_id) VALUES (SEQ_TBL_TASKCODEHISTORY.nextval, TO_DATE(#v_APPLYDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), #v_TASKCODE#, #v_TASKNAME#, #v_TASKNAME2#, #v_CHANGEFACTOR#, #v_CHANGEFACTOR2#, #v_BEFOREVALUE#, #v_AFTERVALUE#, #v_AFTERVALUE2#, #companyID#, #tenantID#)

INSERT INTO TBL_TASKCODE (taskcode, taskname, taskname2, keepingperiod, creationdate, kpreason, keepingmethod, keepingplace, displayrecflag, displayrectrastime, exdisplayfrequency, specialcatalogflag, sc1, sc2, sc3, displayusage, description, subcategorycode, companyid, tenant_id) VALUES (#v_TASKCODE#, #v_TASKNAME#, #v_TASKNAME2#, #v_KEEPINGPERIOD#, TO_DATE(#v_CREATIONDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), #v_KPREASON#, #v_KEEPINGMETHOD#, #v_KEEPINGPLACE#, #v_DISPLAYRECFLAG#, #v_DISPLAYRECTRASTIME#, #v_EXDISPLAYFREQUENCY#, #v_SPECIALCATALOGFLAG#, #v_SC1#, #v_SC2#, #v_SC3#, #v_DISPLAYUSAGE#, #v_DESCRIPTION#, #v_SUBCATEGORYCODE#, #companyID#, #tenantID#)

INSERT INTO TBL_TASK_DEPTINFO( createdate, description, processdeptname, processdeptname2, tasktransferflag, tdeptcode, processdeptcode, processdate, applydate, taskcode, delflag, deletedate, organcode, companyid, tenant_id ) SELECT creationdate, NULL, #deptName#, #deptName2#, '0', NULL, #deptCode#, #v_pNow1#, #v_pNow2#, taskcode, '0', NULL, NULL, #companyID#, #tenantID# FROM TBL_TASKCODE WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND taskcode = #taskCode#

INSERT INTO TBL_FORMCONTAINER (formcontid, formcontname, formcontname2, formcontowndepid, formcontparents, formcontdescription, companyid, tenant_id) VALUES (#contID#, #contName#, #contName2#, #contDept#, #contParent#, #contDescript#, #companyID#, #tenantID#)
INSERT INTO TBL_FORMCONTUSERGROUP (formcontid, formcontuserdepid, companyid, tenant_id) VALUES (#contID#, #deptID#, #companyID#, #tenantID#)
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_CONTAINER SET containertypeid = #contType#, containerowndepid = #deptID# WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND containerid = #contID#

UPDATE TBL_TASKCODE SET taskname = #v_TASKNAME#, taskname2 = #v_TASKNAME2#, keepingperiod = #v_KEEPINGPERIOD#, kpreason = #v_KPREASON#, keepingmethod = #v_KEEPINGMETHOD#, keepingplace = #v_KEEPINGPLACE#, displayrecflag = #v_DISPLAYRECFLAG#, displayrectrastime = #v_DISPLAYRECTRASTIME#, exdisplayfrequency = #v_EXDISPLAYFREQUENCY#, specialcatalogflag = #v_SPECIALCATALOGFLAG#, sc1 = #v_SC1#, sc2 = #v_SC2#, sc3 = #v_SC3#, displayusage = #v_DISPLAYUSAGE#, description = #v_DESCRIPTION#, subcategorycode = #v_SUBCATEGORYCODE# WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND taskcode = #v_TASKCODE#
UPDATE TBL_TASKCODE SET delflag = '1' WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND taskcode = #taskCode#
UPDATE TBL_TASK_DEPTINFO SET delflag = '1', deletedate = TO_DATE(#now#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND taskcode = #taskCode#

UPDATE TBL_TASK_DEPTINFO SET processDate = #v_pNow1#, processDeptName = #deptName#, processDeptName2 = #deptName2#, delFlag = '0', deletedate = NULL WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND taskcode = #taskCode# AND TRIM(processdeptcode) = #deptCode#

UPDATE TBL_TASK_DEPTINFO SET processdate = #v_pNow1#, delflag = '1', deletedate = TO_DATE(#v_pNow2#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid= #companyID# AND taskcode = #taskCode# AND TRIM(processdeptcode) = #deptCode#

UPDATE TBL_FORMCONTAINER SET formcontname = #contName#, formcontname2 = #contName2#, formcontowndepid = #contDept#, formcontparents = #contParent#, formcontdescription = #contDescript# WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND formcontid = #contID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_CONTAINERUSEDEP WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND containerID = #contID#
DELETE FROM TBL_FORMCONTUSERGROUP WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND formcontid = #contID#
DELETE FROM TBL_CONTAINERTODOCSTATE WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT sn, code, id, name FROM TBL_FORMPROPERTY WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND uppercode = #upperCode#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_FORMINFO SET formcontid = #selContID#, formorder = (SELECT NVL(MAX(formorder), 0) + 1 FROM TBL_FORMINFO WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND formcontid = #selContID#) WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND formcontid = #contID# AND formid = #formID#
